about_me: I am a Fullstack JavaScript Developer with 5 years experience, I develop and maintain web applications. I have worked with a variety of programming languages and tools, including but not limited to: JavaScript, Typescript, React.js, Nextjs, Node.js, Nestjs, MongoDB, SQL, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes and Microservices. I am able to work independently and as part of a team and I have ability to take a project from start to finish, ensuring that all the necessary steps are completed along the way.

responsibilities: I'm working with different clients to help built their softwares and apps
Using Upwork and other means to get the clients on monthly basis
Working as Senior Software Developer and managing everything for clients
Worked as a Senior Software Engineer and managed a team 5 developers
Managed projects successfully until startup closed due to funding from investors
Collaborated with other Senior Software Developers
Collaborated with other departments to manage apps
Attended conferences and represented company in big events such as GITEX Dubai 2023
Work as part of a team developing applications and services using Agile development methods
Built customer-facing UI and back-end services
Code, test and operate node.js based service
Worked on blockchain based apps and services
Joined as a Software Engineer I and promoted as a Software Engineer II within a span of one year
Developed applications such as rsd.io and various other apps from scratch
Guided by various senior software engineers with 10+ years of experience
Maintained various apps internal and external of company
Directly interected with various clients
Worked on various technologies
Managed a team of 2 developers remotely
Worked on various new technologies to build applications
developed web application internaly for organization and maintained as well
maintained their previous applications
As a fresher, guided by senior to learn new skills

honours_and_awards.title: Microservices with Node JS and React
Participated in Google DevFest (GDG Kolachi) hackathon, got Runner Up position

projects.name: RSD.ai CMS Dashboard
projects.description: Developed a CMS dashboard for an AI-based audience measurement platform, Red Sea Digital. The system utilizes camera feeds to provide comprehensive analytics, including footfall, demographics, heatmaps, and other relevant data.

projects.name: MachineSells.com
projects.description: Engineered and maintained Pakistan's premium B2B machine trading platform, connecting verified sellers and buyers worldwide for seamless machine trading.

projects.name: CarHub App
projects.description: Designed and developed CarHub, a comprehensive digital platform for automotive services. The app enables service providers to offer their services and promote their offers efficiently.

projects.name: App.Inventooly.com
projects.description: Built Inventooly, an application leveraging Amazon SP APIs for accurate sales forecasting, helping businesses optimize their inventory and sales strategies.

projects.name: Real Research / Real Research eCommerce Store
projects.description: Developed a secure, blockchain-based research tool that gathers reliable data and protects respondent profiles. Survey participants are rewarded with cryptocurrency, enhancing engagement and data quality.

projects.name: Stream Coin / Homeros Coin / Gera Coin
projects.description: Created user dashboards for various cryptocurrency projects, enhancing user experience and engagement within the blockchain ecosystem.

projects.name: PackRat
projects.description: Developed PackRat, a versatile adventure planner that simplifies trip organization for outdoor activities, from day hikes to cross-country journeys.
